## Why It Works

This Tweet works well because it tackles a common human behavior — competition — and reframes it into something more positive and effective: collaboration. The use of simple words like "amazing," "stop," and "start" make this Tweet easy to consume.

## Template

It's amazing how much easier [Aspect of Life or Business] gets when you stop [Common Behavior] and start [More Effective Behavior].

## Example

It's amazing how much easier writing gets when you stop doubting and start drafting.
